name: Apex Defense Solutions
description: Apex Defense Solutions delivers mission-critical cybersecurity and IT services to defense and intelligence agencies. The company specializes in Risk Management Framework (RMF) compliance, Zero Trust Architecture implementation, Security Operations Center (SOC) services, and cloud security for classified and unclassified networks. With a cleared workforce and expertise in CMMC compliance, Apex Defense serves as a trusted partner for DoD contractors and federal agencies requiring defense-grade security posture.
searchBias: cybersecurity DoD DHS intelligence CMMC RMF Zero Trust security clearance classified unclassified networks DISA cyber operations information assurance FISMA compliance penetration testing vulnerability assessment security authorization ATO
systemPromptContext: Apex Defense Solutions is an 85-person defense cybersecurity firm holding CMMC Level 2, ISO 27001, and Top Secret facility clearance. The company targets contracts between $500K-$35M with DoD, DHS, and intelligence agencies, specializing in RMF compliance, security operations, and classified network protection under NAICS 541512, 541519, and 541330.

name: MedBridge Health Systems
targetAgencies: Department of Health and Human Services
description: MedBridge Health Systems provides healthcare IT solutions, electronic health record integration, and remote patient monitoring technologies to federal healthcare agencies. The company specializes in cloud-based health data platforms, clinical analytics, telehealth infrastructure, and interoperability solutions that comply with federal healthcare standards. MedBridge's FedRAMP and HITRUST certifications enable secure delivery of mission-critical health IT services across VA medical centers and HHS programs.
searchBias: healthcare IT VA HHS CMS NIH EHR electronic health records telehealth remote patient monitoring FedRAMP HIPAA HITRUST health data interoperability clinical analytics connected care digital health FHIR HL7 health information exchange
systemPromptContext: MedBridge Health Systems is a 62-employee healthcare IT contractor with FedRAMP Moderate, HIPAA, and HITRUST certifications. The company pursues $750K-$50M contracts with VA, HHS, CMS, and NIH, focusing on EHR integration, telehealth platforms, and health data analytics under NAICS 541511, 621999, and 334510.

name: Cascade Infrastructure Group
description: Cascade Infrastructure Group provides heavy civil construction, environmental remediation, and water infrastructure services to federal agencies. The company specializes in levee repairs, dam rehabilitation, erosion control, wastewater systems, stormwater management, and environmental compliance projects. As an 8(a) and HUBZone certified firm, Cascade delivers design-build and traditional construction services for critical infrastructure supporting flood control, navigation, and environmental restoration missions.
searchBias: Army Corps Engineers civil works levee dam flood control environmental remediation water sewer wastewater stormwater erosion control sediment dredging navigation locks reservoirs infrastructure rehabilitation design-build heavy construction NEPA compliance wetlands restoration
systemPromptContext: Cascade Infrastructure Group is a 145-person 8(a) and HUBZone certified civil construction firm specializing in water infrastructure and environmental projects. The company targets $1M-$45M contracts with Army Corps of Engineers, EPA, DOT, and FEMA for heavy civil works, levee repairs, environmental remediation, and water/wastewater systems under NAICS 237110, 237990, and 562910.
